title: Home page Barobo, Caraga weather forecast section (React Query)

requirements.summary: Add a Barobo, Caraga weather forecast block directly below the Philippine Standard Time display on the Home page.
acceptanceCriteria: On the Home page, a weather forecast block is visible immediately under the Philippine Standard Time line on both mobile and desktop layouts.
The location label is shown in English as “Barobo, Caraga”.

file_operations.description: Create a reusable WeatherForecastSection component that renders the location label “Barobo, Caraga” and displays current conditions plus a multi-day forecast with responsive Tailwind layout. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.

Wire WeatherForecastSection into the Home page directly below the <PhilippineTimeClock /> area, ensuring it sits immediately under the Philippine Standard Time line on both mobile and desktop layouts.

requirements.summary: Fetch and render Barobo, Caraga weather data client-side with React Query, including loading/error states and at least a 3-day forecast.
acceptanceCriteria: Weather data is fetched asynchronously via React Query and does not block initial page render.
While fetching, the weather section shows a clear loading state.
If the fetch fails, the weather section shows a clear error state and does not break the rest of the Home page.
The weather section displays current conditions (e.g., temperature + condition) and at least a 3-day forecast (date/day + high/low and condition).

file_operations.description: Implement a dedicated React Query hook that client-side fetches Barobo, Caraga weather data (e.g., via a public forecast API such as Open-Meteo using Barobo coordinates), parses it into a UI-friendly shape (current conditions + at least 3 days), and exposes query state for loading/error handling.

Connect WeatherForecastSection to useBaroboWeather and render: (1) a non-blocking loading UI while the query is in-flight, (2) a resilient error UI on failure, and (3) current conditions plus at least a 3-day forecast summary on success. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.
